ROOT

From the Roots of Elegance

Scroll
The Philosophy

Elegance isn't applied.
It's grown.

Every fragrance house begins with an idea. ROOT begins lower than that — with what the idea is standing on. We believe true elegance is never surface-level; it's cultivated slowly, drawn up from something deeper.

Each ROOT composition is built the way a root system grows: quietly, deliberately, branching outward only after it has anchored itself. What reaches the skin is simply the visible part of something far more considered.

The Bottle

A vessel as considered as what's inside it.

Deep navy glass, weighted in the hand, finished with a foil-stamped emblem — the ROOT mark, a single root breaking through a broken circle. Gold on navy. Nothing else needed.

ConcentrationEau de Parfum
Volume65 ml
FinishNavy Glass · Gold Foil
OriginComposed to order
The Collection

Five forms, one root.

Every piece in the line grows from the same origin — different strengths, different rituals. Oud and bakhoor details below are placeholders; swap in your real details anytime.

Eau de Parfum · Amber Oriental

ROOT No. 1

An opulent amber oriental joining warm spice with oriental florals and refined woods.

Top — Cardamom, cinnamon, light bergamot, pink pepper
Heart — Damascus rose, amber, saffron, tobacco
Base — White musk, vanilla, patchouli, warm cedarwood

65 ml · 229 AED
Eau de Parfum · Floral Oriental

ROOT No. 2

A warm floral oriental pairing rich fruit with luxurious florals over a deep oud, amber and musk base.

Top — Blackcurrant, plum, light mint, cinnamon
Heart — Turkish & Bulgarian rose, hibiscus, creamy vanilla, honeyed tobacco
Base — Soft oud, amber, benzoin, light smoke, silky musk

65 ml · 214 AED
Body Mist · Dark Gourmand

ROOT Mist No. 1

Dark, bold and almost niche — built for those who want a strong, commanding presence, not quiet or delicate.

Top — Nutmeg, coriander, pink pepper, light lemon, light bergamot, light lavender
Heart — Coconut, wild berries, black pepper, rose, oud, sandalwood, leather
Base — Musk, amber, oud, sandalwood, patchouli, cedarwood, cashmere woods

120 ml · 149 AED
Body Mist · Cherry Musk

ROOT Mist No. 2

A velvety cherry musk — clean, soft and addictive, the kind of scent people lean in for.

Top — Cherry, almond, light fruity sweetness
Heart — Velvety cherry, soft powder, white musk
Base — White musk, clean cotton, creamy warmth

120 ml · 129 AED
Mabkhoor

Scented Oud Wood

Hand-soaked oud chips, slow-burning — the raw material at the base of every ROOT scent, offered on its own.

40 g
Bakhoor

House Bakhoor

Traditional bukhoor blend — oud, resins, and amber, formulated to fill a room the way the fragrances fill a room.

60 g
The Composition

Built like the mark itself.

ROOT No. 1, our flagship, is structured the way our emblem grows — surfacing first, then settling deeper.

TopCardamom
Bergamot
HeartRose
Saffron
BaseMusk
Sandalwood
